Name: Yew Chung International School of Hong Kong
Tagline: Seeking a top International School in Hong Kong? Through-train education for ages 6 months-18 years. Learn more!
About: * Required The password must contain letters, numbers and special characters, at least 6 characters.
Philosophy: YCIS Hong Kong has played a revolutionary role in developing education in Hong Kong. The school provides through-train, international education to expatriate and local children aged 6 months to 18 years old.
Outcomes: Students use their time at YCIS to improve and prepare for the future. Through career planning workshops and global university networking activities, our dedicated guidance counsellors provide individual and in-depth guidance to all students as they embark on the next steps in their lives.
Admissions: All admission related fees are listed clearly in our Admissions and Enrolment pack and on the Yew Chung International School Hong Kong (YCIS HK) website. These fees should be paid directly to the official accounts of YCIS HK.
Quote: Our unique Western and Chinese co-leadership model attracts top educators from around the world.

Performance.Academic Integration: For some Year levels the students enjoy Learning Communities open plan flexible spaces, which provide multiple learning options depending on the task in-hand.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: YCIS Hong Kong campuses are more than places of education. They are places for students to grow with no boundaries.
Performance.Coaching Credentials: Today, YCIS Hong Kong operates eight campuses across prime locations in Kowloon Tong, along with an additional campus in the heart of Tseung Kwan O. We provide a seamless, world-class educational journey from Early Childhood Education (ECE) through Secondary, welcoming children aged 6 months to 18 years from both local and international families.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: Ms Ingrid Luk Van graduated from the University of Pennsylvania (MPhilEd, MSEd) and the University of Virginia (BA), specialising in mental health counselling and psychology. She co-authored a scientific literature review for Current Diabetes Reports with the University of Virginia’s School of Medicine.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: YCIS Hong Kong is a fully accredited school recognised by the Council of International Schools (CIS) and an approved Cambridge International Examinations testing centre for the International General Certificate of Secondary Education (IGCSE). As an International Baccalaureate World School (IB World School), we are proud to offer the International Baccalaureate (IB) Diploma Programme as part of our international curriculum.
